entries.name: Academic Manuscript Revision Boundaries
entries.summary: Revise a manuscript from argument and paragraph logic to local academic expression, protect evidence-bearing content and Word markup, and use rendered layout QA only after the text revision is meaning-safe.

entries.name: Baoyu Skills Network Learning
entries.summary: Review Baoyu skills by individual takeover surface, not as a bundle. Keep browser-cookie, credential, publishing, and multi-provider capabilities out of global installation; trial only a project-local, explicitly authorized diagram workflow after runtime and output validation.

entries.name: Codebase Memory MCP
entries.summary: Use codebase-memory-mcp as a local structural codebase index before broad repository reading; verify graph results against source files before making behavior claims.

entries.name: Experience System Error Feedback
entries.summary: Unexpected experience-system behavior should become a structured error report before it becomes verified experience, knowledge, or a skill change.

entries.name: Experience and Knowledge Architecture
entries.summary: Promote evidence into verified experience, keep Markdown canonical, treat maps and images as derived views, and export only explicit user-learning material to Anki.

entries.name: Experience Knowledge Subskill Refinement
entries.summary: Refine the experience and knowledge system by keeping parent skills as routing surfaces and moving long verified mode contracts into owner-internal subskills when ownership and safety boundaries do not change.

entries.name: Global Experience System
entries.summary: Treat the global experience system as a coordinated loop across existing owners; refine it with handoff artifacts and owner-internal subskills before adding a top-level module.

entries.name: Header Frame Body Wrap Diagnostic
entries.summary: When a locked-template DOCX has a persistent staircase-shaped page-top body exclusion, inspect empty wrapping frames in the active header parts before changing body indentation; treat any repair coordinate as project-local until independently reproduced.

entries.name: Learning Audience Boundary
entries.summary: Separate Codex-local operating knowledge from user study; send internal rules to the Codex learning index and export only explicitly user-facing recall material to Anki.

entries.name: Learning Governance
entries.summary: Trigger learning only from a concrete gap plus qualifying evidence; compare project or primary external sources against the current owner, make a reversible tested change, and promote only verified results after architecture and economy review.

entries.name: Locked Template DOCX Package Invariants
entries.summary: For a locked-template DOCX, snapshot critical package parts and media, patch the smallest known surface, compare intentional XML changes semantically, and accept only after both hard structural checks and rendered-page review pass.

entries.name: Matt Pocock Skills Network Learning
entries.summary: Matt Pocock skills reinforce skill economy through invocation load, information hierarchy, explicit completion criteria, repo-local setup documents, and feedback loops; external skills can be installed only after necessity, value, compatibility, and verification are established.

entries.name: Mother Skill Refinement
entries.summary: Refine a broad mother skill by keeping its parent SKILL.md as the discovery and routing surface while moving long gates, recovery flows, release commands, and specialized mode contracts into owner-internal subskills.

entries.name: Oh My Codex and OMX Lite Network Learning
entries.path: 30-Knowledge\Oh My Codex and OMX Lite Network Learning.md
entries.summary: Compare external Codex workflow packages by takeover surface before installing. Full runtimes that manage hooks, config, state, worktrees, team sessions, and implicit routing are usually learn-only or owner-reference in this Windows Codex Desktop architecture; lite methodology packages can contribute manifest, dry-run, backup, explicit-invocation, and size-budget gates after local adaptation.

entries.name: Project Creation Capability
entries.summary: A project is created in the experience system when evidence is converted into lifecycle files, project-local skills, storage records, runtime checks, error reports, and verified iteration records.

entries.name: Project Vocabulary and Decision Brief
entries.summary: For requirement work with repeated domain ambiguity, trial a project-local vocabulary and decision brief under codex-requirement-authoring; validate its effect on one real follow-on workflow before promoting it to a reusable subskill or rule.

entries.name: Provider Capability Boundary
entries.summary: Route an OpenAI-compatible provider only to chat or embeddings interfaces it actually supports; retain specialized image, audio, full-text, and domain APIs.

entries.name: Subskill Packaging Boundary
entries.summary: Use subskill-style packaging inside an existing owner when a capability needs its own contract or tests but does not justify a new top-level skill; promote it only after independent evidence shows a separate owner boundary.

entries.name: Top-Level Owner Governance
entries.summary: A top-level owner can evolve only with explicit current-iteration user authority, an evidence-backed boundary comparison, a rollback or migration condition, and validation; otherwise retain the owner and improve it internally.

entries.name: Visual Format Selection
entries.summary: Select image format from the reader task and delivery constraints before generation or conversion. Mermaid and SVG are conditional structural/editable formats; generated and photographic visuals should normally be PNG or JPG according to transparency, fidelity, and size needs.

entries.name: XLW1 JME Formatting Guardrails
entries.summary: In XLW1, preserve black headings, Word-native single-column equations, superscript body citations with baseline references, template first-odd-even header behavior, and ordinary table-cell fonts; validate by Word-to-PDF rendering rather than DOCX inspection alone.

entries.name: XLW1 Source Figure Integrity
entries.summary: XLW1 final figures must remain traceable to thesis or author-owned source figures; retain axes, borders, annotations, and experimental traces, and allow only non-substantive clarity improvements such as high-resolution export, mild sharpening, and padding.

entries.name: XLW1 Template Header and Visual Object Fidelity
entries.path: 30-Knowledge\XLW1 Template Header and Visual Object Fidelity.md
entries.summary: For XLW1, inspect the supplied JME template's actual header parts and editable table cells before changing typography; use the template's unpublished-manuscript header state and do not alter fonts embedded inside source images.

entries.name: XLW1 Version Authority
entries.summary: For XLW1 manuscript work, identify the source DOCX from the newest explicit user instruction, record its path and SHA-256 before changing it, and write each structural revision to a separately named process-folder output.

entries.name: Academic Figure Optimizer Module
entries.summary: Use academic-figure-optimizer for data-faithful scientific figure re-rendering, user-requested or inferred dimensions, publication typography, arbitrary supported raster/vector exports, and layout repair; do not use generative image redraws for quantitative plots.

entries.name: Academic Text Style Module
entries.summary: Route academic prose style work to codex-text-style when expression clarity or register must improve without changing the research record.

entries.name: Exact Word Layout Module
entries.summary: Route fragile locked-template Word layout edits to codex-exact-word-layout when the acceptance criterion is rendered page fidelity rather than simple DOCX text mutation.

entries.name: Image Workflow Module
entries.summary: Delete a local knowledge image only after upload, HTTPS retrieval, complete reference replacement, quarantine copy, committed manifest, and zero remaining local references all succeed.

entries.name: Knowledge System Module
entries.summary: Promote knowledge into a global skill only when it is non-trivial, specific, verified, reusable, non-duplicate, and has scope and invalidation conditions.

entries.name: Portable Path Configuration
entries.summary: Git-tracked skills, knowledge records, manifests, and public docs must use logical roots or repository-relative paths; machine-specific roots belong in the local portable profile or environment variables.

entries.name: XLW1 Manuscript Knowledge Map
entries.summary: Route XLW1 requests through its source-authority, JME-formatting, figure-integrity, and refinement-workflow notes before changing the manuscript.

entries.name: Academic Research Workflow
entries.summary: Use the codex-text-style academic research workflow submodule to plan multi-step work with source locators and evidence status before specialist reading, writing, code, or figure actions.

entries.name: Academic Text Style Workflow
entries.summary: Establish a bounded academic style profile, revise only expression, compare against the source, and report unresolved meaning or evidence risk.

entries.name: Codebase Graph Evidence Workflow
entries.summary: For repository-scale learning, use codebase-memory-mcp to route evidence first, then verify every claim against cited source files before editing or reporting.

entries.name: Content Production Workflow
entries.summary: Produce reader-facing content from a source-aware brief through outline, draft, optional asset handoff, and review; keep publication and high-authority external actions separate from drafting.

entries.name: Exact Word Layout Workflow
entries.summary: For locked-template DOCX layout repairs, preserve the authoritative file, patch only the smallest local OOXML or Word COM surface, then trust rendered page QA over structural checks when they disagree.

entries.name: Global Iteration Candidate Report
entries.summary: After a completed global iteration, generate an advisory candidate report so the user can make explicit promotion, test, retirement, or external-authority decisions.

entries.name: Integrated Experience Feedback Loop
entries.summary: Integrated experience work routes knowledge, generated visuals, hosted images, error reports, and verified lessons through their owning modules instead of merging those modules.

entries.name: Local Experience Iteration Workflow
entries.summary: Build whole local experience iterations from bounded metadata and verified project artifacts before considering matched raw sessions.

entries.name: Mind Map Knowledge Workflow
entries.summary: Keep Markdown and typed links canonical; use MindMaster, Mermaid, and exported images only as reproducible derived views.

entries.name: Project Creation From Experience Workflow
entries.summary: New project creation should turn folder evidence into lifecycle files, project-local skills, storage indexes, runtime preflight, error feedback, and verified retrospectives before promoting global lessons.

entries.name: XLW1 Manuscript Refinement Workflow
entries.summary: Execute XLW1 refinement in the order source authority, structure, technical evidence chain, natural Chinese academic prose, JME formatting, and rendered PDF QA; preserve references and source evidence unless the user explicitly changes them.

entries.name: Zotero Reference Workflow
entries.summary: Recover the Zotero numeric user ID from /keys/<key> metadata before calling /users/{id}; never record the key itself.
